title: eleocharis subfoliata
intro: Eleocharis subfoliata, also known as dwarf spike-rush, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the sedge family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Eleocharis subfoliata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
